Hermès Lindy 30 - Clemence Leather in Bleu Paon (Silver Hardware)

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Lindy 30
Material: Taurillon Clemence Leather
Color: Bleu Paon (A rare, discontinued shade, featuring a beautiful blue with a touch of green)
Hardware: Silver-tone / Palladium Hardware (PHW)
Dimensions: 30 x 19 x 6 cm
Blind Stamp: Square P

Condition Report:
Condition: (Excellent/Pristine).
The bag is in mint condition with the original protective films still attached to some parts of the hardware.

Style Notes:
The Lindy naturally has an effortless and elegant aura. This discontinued Bleu Paon shade is very sophisticated yet vibrant, avoiding any monotony. Whether worn with a daily work outfit or casual weekend looks, it will instantly elevate the texture and style of your entire look.
